summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Douro 7.E blog. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly.

issues: Minor React console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in LoginPage - setState called during render. Non-breaking but worth fixing.

action_items: Fix React setState-during-render warning in LoginPage (when redirecting after login, use useEffect instead of setting state in render)
critical_code_review_comments: CORS: server.py sets CORS with allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL], but CORS_ORIGINS env var is set but unused - minor inconsistency
Admin seed: existing admin password update works correctly (idempotent seed)
bcrypt hash verified to work correctly with verify_password
httpOnly cookies are set on login - secure auth flow

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages, navigation, login, admin dashboard, comment submission work correctly

seed_data_creation: 3 sample posts and 4 timeline events seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs functional. Admin login works. Admin dashboard tabs: Trabalhos(3), Galeria(0), Cronologia(4), Equipa(0), Comentários. Comment submission on post page works with success toast. Minor React warning in LoginPage setState during render.
